claims.summary: PI memory, gate, and filtering can retain correction history and may contribute to sticky or oscillatory texture.
claims.disposition: Verified current PI leak, actuator-aware anti-windup, bounded accumulators, and gate/filter source without treating those mechanisms as a complete explanation of the felt report.

claims.summary: Mode packing and porosity need to remain visible beside the top-line pressure scalar.
claims.disposition: Verified read-only semantic-viscosity, pressure-source porosity, and resonance-texture evidence with explicit non-control authority.

claims.summary: Pressure should be observed over controller ticks and correlated with viscosity, loss, mode packing, and actuator state.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded time-aligned observation using existing telemetry with no controller mutation or causal conclusion.

claims.summary: Porosity-aware dampening or PI changes should loosen viscous persistence.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because damping, PI gains, filter behavior, and controller inputs are live Minime regulation.
